name: to.agentcentral/amazon-seller-central
title: agentcentral
description: agentcentral is a hosted Amazon MCP server, Amazon Seller Central MCP server, and Amazon Ads MCP server for Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Claude Code, OpenClaw, and other HTTP-capable MCP clients. It exposes 141 domain-scoped tools and 148 hosted production tools total for fast Amazon seller reads plus safe guarded writes.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer agentcentral API key, for example: Bearer ac_live_<YOUR_API_KEY>
